packages.description: Headless DAW session surface for SIM audio graph workspaces.
packages.name: sim-lib-daw-session
packages.rustdoc_summary: Headless DAW session surface for SIM audio graph workspaces.

packages.description: BLE-MIDI discovery, packet framing, and stream-host placement seams.
packages.name: sim-lib-midi-ble
packages.rustdoc_summary: BLE-MIDI discovery, packet framing, and stream-host placement support.

packages.description: Core MIDI event, channel, tick-time, device, and in-memory transport models.
packages.name: sim-lib-midi-core
packages.rustdoc_summary: Core MIDI data model and in-memory I/O for the SIM music stack.

packages.description: In-memory live MIDI session descriptors and ring-buffer transport models.
packages.name: sim-lib-midi-live
packages.rustdoc_summary: Real-time MIDI buffering for the SIM music stack.

packages.description: Modeled RtMidi MIDI adapter surface for SIM (in-process simulation; no live MIDI hardware I/O).
packages.name: sim-lib-midi-rtmidi
packages.rustdoc_summary: RtMidi MIDI adapter surface for SIM.

packages.description: Text codecs, citizen descriptors, and runtime shapes for MIDI events and files.
packages.name: sim-lib-midi-shapes
packages.rustdoc_summary: Shape and citizen surfaces that expose the MIDI model to the SIM runtime.

packages.description: Standard MIDI File reader and writer helpers for deterministic SIM MIDI fixtures.
packages.name: sim-lib-midi-smf
packages.rustdoc_summary: Standard MIDI File (SMF) reading and writing for the SIM music stack.

packages.description: System-exclusive MIDI message models, checksums, and device payload helpers.
packages.name: sim-lib-midi-sysex
packages.rustdoc_summary: Typed views over MIDI system-exclusive (SysEx) messages.

packages.description: MIDI binary-frame facade descriptors.
packages.name: sim-lib-midi-wasm-frame
packages.rustdoc_summary: MIDI binary-frame facade descriptors.

packages.description: Chord windows, diff rolls, histograms, and analysis views over SIM music.
packages.name: sim-lib-music-analysis
packages.rustdoc_summary: Analysis of musical material for the SIM music libraries.

packages.description: Composable melody, rhythm, arpeggio, bassline, and pattern-building helpers.
packages.name: sim-lib-music-combinators
packages.rustdoc_summary: Composable music-transform combinators for the SIM music constellation.

packages.description: Core music object model for notes, rests, scores, rolls, players, and arrangers.
packages.name: sim-lib-music-core
packages.rustdoc_summary: Core music model layer for the SIM music constellation.

packages.description: Lifts MIDI files and tracks into progression, counterpoint, piano-roll, and diff views.
packages.name: sim-lib-music-lift
packages.rustdoc_summary: Lifts music from lower-level representations to higher-level ones.

packages.description: Lowering from structured SIM music objects into MIDI tracks and SMF-ready events.
packages.name: sim-lib-music-lower
packages.rustdoc_summary: Lowers music from higher-level representations to renderable ones.

packages.description: LilyPond subset import and export helpers for SIM score and melody objects.
packages.name: sim-lib-music-notation
packages.rustdoc_summary: Score and notation model for the SIM music libraries.

packages.description: Text codecs, citizen descriptors, and runtime shapes for SIM music objects.
packages.name: sim-lib-music-shapes
packages.rustdoc_summary: Shape protocol surfaces for SIM music types.

packages.description: Playable pure Rust software synthesizer primitives for the SIM audio graph.
packages.name: sim-lib-music-synth
packages.rustdoc_summary: Playable pure-Rust software synthesizer primitives for the SIM audio graph.

packages.description: Pitch, time, pattern, and diagnostic transforms over canonical SIM music objects.

packages.description: Music binary-frame facade descriptors.

packages.rustdoc_summary: Music binary-frame facade descriptors.

packages.description: Pitch-domain dissonance and interval-density scoring over chord material.

packages.description: Riemannian harmonic function labels for triads and tonal contexts.

packages.description: Scale, key, mode, and degree mapping helpers for pitch-domain transforms.

packages.description: Pitch-class set masks, normal forms, interval vectors, and set operations.

packages.description: General MIDI instrument and drum-kit descriptors for sound and MIDI bridges.

packages.description: Offline PCM rendering, WAV encoding, and render diagnostics for sound objects.

packages.description: Text codecs, citizen descriptors, and runtime shapes for sound-domain values.

packages.description: Partial lists, spectral centroids, and harmonic spectrum descriptors.
